title: Shaheen & Gordon, P.A.
address: 107 Storrs Street, P.O. Box 2703, Concord, NH, 03302
details: Shaheen & Gordon, P.A. is one of the largest law firms in the State of New Hampshire and is among the fastest growing firms in northern New England. We are a full service law firm, addressing individual and institutional client needs no matter where those needs arise. Our success is due to our approach. We respond quickly, thoughtfully and, at times, forcefully, to the challenges of a diverse client base. Our lawyers apply a depth of professional experience to a wide range of legal matters. Whether in a court room or a board room, our firm provides comprehensive, proactive, and cost-efficient legal representation in a number of practice areas and proudly serves businesses, families, and individuals throughout the region, including New Hampshire, Maine, Massachusetts and Vermont.Our firm approaches client concerns with tenacity and creativity, achieving the best available results for those that we represent. With equal energy, we address legal matters large and small with the skill, commitment and resources of one of New Hampshire's largest firms. We have delivered results for our clients for over 30 years. Along the way, our attorneys have developed a great deal of legal insight, collected industry honors and awards, and established a record of successful case results. We are proud of our outstanding reputation and appreciate that it exists only because of satisfied clients. Our ongoing commitment is to apply our deep pool of resources, professional connections, and a firmly rooted reputation in our legal community to each and every case we accept. When you want strong legal minds and resources in your corner, you need Shaheen & Gordon, P.A..
